description:
Comprehensive regression tests for the current-branch launch path.

## What to test

1. Current-branch launch does NOT call `prepareTicketWorktree()`
2. tmux cwd is repo root / `checkoutPath`, NOT a worktree path
3. Current-branch workers do NOT have `worktreePath` set
4. Current-branch launch does NOT fail when checkout has dirty or untracked files
5. Current-branch launch rejects detached HEAD unless explicitly configured
6. Handoff prompt contains all required instructions (see handoff task)
7. Handoff prompt discourages broad staging commands
8. Handoff prompt does NOT mention worktrees
9. `/bw run --workers N` can launch multiple current-branch workers simultaneously
10. Worker runtime dirs are created in the expected location
11. Worker record in registry has correct `executionMode`, `branchName`, `launchHead`
12. Existing worktree launch behavior preserved when mode is `worktree`
13. `branchName` and `launchHead` are recorded BEFORE tmux launch

## Tests Location

`packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/__tests__/current-branch-launch.test.ts`

## Design Rules

- Use mocked ProcessRunner and tmux backend for unit testing
- Include at least one integration-style test with a real git repo fixture
- Test the dirty-checkout tolerance explicitly (create dirty files, launch should succeed)
- Test multiple concurrent launches (no serialization requirement)

## Definition of Done

- All 13+ test scenarios pass
- Tests clearly document what they prove
- lint/test/typecheck pass clean
title: Add Phase 2 launch regression tests
